The '''''Star Sea Flower''''' was the personal [[YT-1150 cargo transport]] of the aquatic [[Priapulin]], [[Charza Kwinn]]. Using it, Kwinn was able to transport [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].

The interior of the ship was dark and damp; pumps and filters were used to refresh the water. Small wriggling things and larger animals populated the ship and the latter were followed by tiny spotlights, which, along with instruments and thin laser beams, provided some illumination.

There were quarters for non-aquatic species, which were used by Kenobi and Skywalker.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
